section.heading: Retired lists

subsection.content: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned, there shall be maintained retired lists containing the names of the Reserves of the armed forces under the Secretary’s jurisdiction who are in the Retired Reserve.
The Secretary of the Navy shall maintain a United States Naval Reserve Retired List containing the names of members of the Navy Reserve and the Marine Corps Reserve entitled to retired pay.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title XVI, § 1662(k)(1), Oct. 5, 1994, 108 Stat. 3006; amended Pub. L. 109–163, div. A, title V, § 515(b)(1)(NN), Jan. 6, 2006, 119 Stat. 3234.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 1376(a) and 6017 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(k)(2), (3)(A)(i).

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2006—Subsec. (b). Pub. L. 109–163 substituted “the Navy Reserve” for “the Naval Reserve”.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Dec. 1, 1994, except as otherwise provided, see section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337, set out as a note under section 10001 of this title.
